sections.paragraph: ἀρεσϰεία, ας, ἡ less favored accentuation ἀρέσϰεια [ἀρέσκω; in both a bad sense ‘fawning deference’ and a good sense ‘disposition to please’] a common term in honorary documents expressing desire to be accommodating in meeting the needs and interests of others, desire to please Col 1:10.
